name: Baseten
description: Baseten ML model deployment and inference infrastructure platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Baseten
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Baseten → Settings → API Keys → Create API Key
